hooks.command: node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const cmd=(JSON.parse(d).tool_input||{}).command||"";if(cmd.includes("git push")){const {execSync}=require("child_process");try{const s=execSync("git -C C:/Users/louis/elev-v3 status --short",{encoding:"utf8"});const dirty=s.split("\n").filter(l=>l.trim()&&l.indexOf("supabase/.temp")<0);if(dirty.length)process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({continue:false,stopReason:dirty.length+" fichier(s) non commite(s) detectes - fais git add + git commit avant de pusher."}))}catch(e){}}});'
